S.FORM: == tayi' == 大便 Tata'ang ko tayi' no kolong. 牛的大便很大.
S.PHON: == tajiʡ == ** tataʡaŋ ko~u tajiʡ no~u ko~uɾo~uŋ. ******.
S.FORM: == tayi' == 大便 Tata'ang ko tayi' no kolong. 牛的大便很大.
S.PHON: == tajiʡ == ** tataʡaŋ ko~u tajiʡ no~u ko~uɾo~uŋ. ******.
